steps.description: Click the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "New Project" window of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" option within the dropdown menu to select it.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the dropdown menu within the "Programming Language" selection box at the top of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Default folder" input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to specify the directory path for the project.
Click inside the text input field labeled "Type a message..." at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface to begin typing a message.

parameters.text: How to develop agent for Teams?

steps.description: Type text: 'How to develop agent for Teams?' into the input field labeled 'Type a message...' in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the message "How to develop agent for Teams?" in the input field at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface.
@assertion bot has responded to the user's question.
